title: The CEO's Office
subtitle: Homicide / High-Rise
brief: Wall Street CEO Richard Harrington found bludgeoned in his penthouse office at midnight. The reinforced doors were magnetically locked from the inside. A classic sealed-room mystery.
text: The Heavy Bronze Bookend was the weapon. Vance, his aggressive VP, was seen arguing over the corporate buyout. He bypassed the security grid through the ventilation shaft and cut the power.

clues.name: Bronze Bookend
clues.desc: A massive desk ornament. Dark stains on the base.
clues.hidden: FORENSICS: Dust disturbed, recently moved. Fingerprints match Vance.

clues.name: Shattered Aviators
clues.desc: Wireframe glasses found trampled near the leather sofa.
clues.hidden: ANALYSIS: The prescription indicates extreme near-sightedness.

clues.name: Shredded Contract
clues.desc: Half-destroyed document wedged in the paper shredder.
clues.hidden: DOCUMENT: Vance was being forced out of the firm.

clues.name: Ash Footprint
clues.hidden: TRACE: Matches the imported cigar ash from the executive lounge.

suspects.name: Sarah
suspects.hint: ALIBI: Making photocopies on the lower floor.

suspects.name: Vance
suspects.hint: MOTIVE: Facing bankruptcy and losing his job.

suspects.name: George
suspects.hint: CHECK: Has perfect 20/20 vision. Doesn't wear glasses.

suspects.name: Mrs. P
suspects.hint: ALIBI: Passed out in her condo downtown.

title: The Ice Tea Alibi
subtitle: Poisoning / Midnight Diner
brief: A corporate informant collapsed in a gritty 24-hour diner. He shared a pitcher of iced tea with a rival. Both drank the exact same tea, but only the informant died.
text: The poison was frozen inside the **ice cubes**. Julian drank his tea quickly before the ice could melt, surviving unscathed. The victim sipped slowly, allowing the lethal ice to dissolve into his drink.

clues.name: Victim's Glass
clues.desc: Half-full glass of tea. The ice is completely melted.
clues.hidden: LAB: Highly concentrated liquid toxin found mixed in the drink.

clues.name: Julian's Glass
clues.desc: Completely drained glass. Large ice cubes remain intact.
clues.hidden: LAB: Zero trace of poison found in the leftover ice.

clues.name: Manila Folder
clues.desc: Dropped on the booth seat. Glossy photos spilling out.
clues.hidden: MOTIVE: Photographic proof of Julian's massive embezzlement.

clues.name: Sugar Dispenser
clues.desc: Classic diner sugar shaker next to the napkin holder.
clues.hidden: ANALYSIS: Tested completely clean. Used as a distraction.

suspects.name: Waitress
suspects.hint: ALIBI: Poured both glasses from the exact same pitcher.

suspects.name: Julian
suspects.hint: FACT: Shared the tea, but nervously drank his in one gulp.

suspects.name: Cook
suspects.hint: CHECK: Never left the kitchen. Doesn't handle ice.

suspects.name: Boss
suspects.hint: ALIBI: Out of state during the late-night meeting.
